Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 26 

NC_NVGTN_CASE_ID 

LABEL: Navigation Case Unique Identifier 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation case (NC) standardized nine-digit unique navigation case identifier. 

LONG NAME: NC_NVGTN_CASE_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 9 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: Alphanumeric character string that contains intelligence (e.g., 323006639 is the 6,639th navigation 
case for the AHC bridge
